rate_limit.reached: Достигнут лимит в {0} сообщений в {1} секунд
rate_limit.summary_reached: You have reached the limit of {0} summary digests over {1} seconds. Quests in this period will not be delivered until the window resets — consider using a less frequent {2}summary schedule or trimming your tracked rewards.
msg.settime.err_end_before_start: end time must be after start time (cross-midnight not supported)
msg.settime.err_step_out_of_range: step must be between 1 and 23 hours
rate_limit.banned_soft: Достигнут лимит оповещений слишком много раз за 24 часа, оповещения отключены. {0}start, чтобы включить
rate_limit.banned_hard: Достигнут лимит оповещений слишком много раз за 24 часа, оповещения отключены. Обратитесь к администратору для возобновления
rate_limit.shame: <@{0}> был отключён за слишком частое превышение лимита оповещений!
delivery.fail.shame: <@{0}> has been disabled because Poracle messages keep failing to deliver to them.
tracking.weight_fmt: weight: {0}-{1}g ⚠️ legacy filter — weight is no longer reliable; use untrack id:N to remove this rule
tracking.including_slot_changes: включая оповещения об изменении слотов в гимах
tracking.bulk_changes: I have made a lot of changes. See {0}{1} for details
tracking.warn_stopped: Your alerts are currently paused. Use {0}start to resume them.
tracking.warn_no_location: You are tracking by distance but have no location set. Use !location to set one.
tracking.warn_no_area: You are tracking by area but have no areas set. Use !area to add some.
tracking.warn_max_distance: Distance has been capped to the maximum of {0}m.
tracking.warn_template_not_found: Template "{0}" not found for type {1}/{2}. Tracking saved but alerts may not render.
tracking.id_hint: To remove a specific entry, use its id — e.g. `{0}untrack id:45` or `{0}raid remove id:12`
tracking.id_hint_slash: To remove a specific entry, run `/untrack <type>` (e.g. `/untrack raid`) and pick it from the list.
msg.mute.id_not_supported: `!mute id:N` / `!mute <type> id:N` aren't supported yet — entity scopes (gym, pokemon, area, pokestop, station, everything) work today. Per-rule muting by UID is a follow-up.
msg.mute.bad_uid: `{0}` isn't a valid tracking rule UID. Use `!tracked` to see your rule UIDs.
msg.mute.unknown_area: `{0}` isn't in your available areas. Use `!area` to see what you can mute.
msg.mute.no_pokemon: I don't know a pokemon called `{0}`.
msg.button.unavailable: This button is no longer available.
msg.button.unidentified: Couldn't identify you to handle that click.
msg.button.cooldown: Slow down — try that again in a moment.
msg.button.missing_scope: Button is missing a scope — operator config bug.
msg.button.missing_target: Couldn't find a {0} to mute on this alert.
msg.button.no_dm_target: Couldn't identify you to send the message.
msg.button.unsubscribe_already: Those tracking rules were already removed.

section.forts.none: You're not tracking any fort updates

msg.egg.usage: Valid commands are e.g. `{0}egg level:5`, `{0}egg legendary`, `{0}egg remove everything`
msg.raid.usage: Valid commands are e.g. `{0}raid level:5`, `{0}raid pikachu`, `{0}raid remove everything`
msg.track.usage: Valid commands are e.g. `{0}track pikachu iv:100`, `{0}track everything iv:90`, `{0}track remove pikachu`
msg.track.everything_no_filters: Слишком много оповещений. Добавь больше фильтров.
msg.track.invalid_cap: This level cap is not supported, valid choices are: {0}
msg.quest.usage: Valid commands are e.g. `{0}quest pikachu`, `{0}quest stardust:1000`, `{0}quest energy:charizard`
msg.quest.edit_summary_conflict: `edit` and `summary` are mutually exclusive — pick one.

msg.schedule.tz.from_location: Times are in {0} (from your location); currently {1}.

msg.lure.usage: Valid commands are e.g. `{0}lure glacial`, `{0}lure everything`, `{0}lure remove glacial`
msg.gym.usage: Valid commands are e.g. `{0}gym valor`, `{0}gym everything slot_changes`, `{0}gym remove valor`
msg.gym_lookup.no_scanner: Gym lookup requires a scanner database — none is configured for this server.

msg.gym_lookup.too_many: More than {1} gyms match `{0}` — please refine your search.
msg.gym_lookup.multiple: Multiple gyms match `{0}` ({1}). Re-run with the gym ID directly:

msg.backup.need_name: Your backup needs a valid name (letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores only)

slash.desc.info: Look up pokemon info, shiny rates, rarity tiers, or current weather
slash.opt.info.pokemon.desc: Show types, stats, evolutions, weather boost and CP table for a pokemon
slash.opt.info.pokemon.name: name
slash.opt.info.pokemon.name.desc: Pokemon name (any supported language) or dex id
slash.opt.info.rarity.desc: List pokemon by spawn rarity tier (common → ultra-rare)
slash.opt.info.shiny.desc: Show observed shiny rates per species
slash.opt.info.weather.desc: Show current weather and boosted types for a location
slash.desc.raid: Track a raid boss or raid level
slash.desc.incident: Track a pokestop incident (Kecleon, Gold Pokestop, Showcase…)
slash.desc.gym: Track gym team / slot / battle changes
slash.opt.track.great_rank.desc: Top PVP rank in the Great League
slash.opt.track.ultra_rank.desc: Top PVP rank in the Ultra League
slash.opt.track.little_rank.desc: Top PVP rank in the Little League
slash.opt.track.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the pokemon despawns
slash.opt.raid.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the raid expires
slash.opt.egg.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the egg hatches
slash.opt.quest.min_amount.desc: Minimum reward amount (item / candy / mega_energy only)
slash.opt.quest.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the quest is completed
slash.opt.quest.summary.desc: Buffer matches and dispatch in a scheduled batch instead of alerting immediately
slash.opt.invasion.grunt_type.desc: Grunt type (Fire, Water…), boss (Giovanni…), or incident (Kecleon…)
slash.opt.invasion.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the invasion expires
slash.opt.incident.type.desc: Pokestop incident type (Kecleon, Gold Pokestop, Showcase…)
slash.opt.incident.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the incident expires
slash.opt.lure.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the lure expires
slash.opt.nest.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the nest expires
slash.opt.maxbattle.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the battle ends
slash.opt.gym.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the gym state changes
slash.opt.fort.clean.desc: Auto-delete the alert when the fort changes again
slash.opt.untrack.pokemon.tracking.desc: Pick from your existing pokemon tracking rules
slash.opt.untrack.raid.tracking.desc: Pick from your existing raid tracking rules
slash.opt.untrack.egg.tracking.desc: Pick from your existing egg tracking rules

slash.opt.area.remove.desc: Remove an area from your tracking

slash.opt.area.overview.desc: Map overview of every area available to you

slash.opt.profile.delete.name: name

msg.help.text:
**Available commands:**
{0}track <pokemon> [iv:N] [cp:N] [level:N] [d:N] — Track pokemon
{0}untrack <pokemon> — Remove pokemon tracking
{0}raid <pokemon|level:N|legendary> [d:N] — Track raids
{0}egg <level:N|legendary|mega> [d:N] — Track eggs
{0}quest <pokemon|stardust|energy:pokemon|candy:pokemon> — Track quests
{0}invasion [everything|<type>] — Track invasions
{0}lure <type|everything> — Track lures
{0}gym <team|everything> [slot_changes] — Track gyms
{0}nest <pokemon|everything> — Track nests
{0}maxbattle <pokemon|level:N> — Track max battles
{0}fort <pokestop|gym|everything> — Track fort updates
{0}tracked — Show all tracking
{0}script — Export tracking as commands
{0}area [list|add|remove] — Manage areas
{0}location <lat,lon> — Set location
{0}profile [list|add|remove|switch] — Manage profiles
{0}language <code> — Set language
{0}start / {0}stop — Enable/disable alerts
{0}version — Show version
cmd.poracle_admin.not_admin: This command is reserved for administrators.
cmd.poracle_admin.unknown_group: Unknown subgroup. Try `!poracle-admin` for the list.
cmd.poracle_admin.unknown_sub: Unknown subcommand for `{0}`. Try `!poracle-admin {0}` to see what's available.
cmd.poracle_admin.help.admin_only: This command is reserved for server administrators. Each subgroup performs a live operations task.
cmd.poracle_admin.help_intro:
🛠️ Poracle Admin

Live operations subgroups (administrators only):
cmd.poracle_admin.group.reload.desc: reload DTS, geofence, or in-memory state
cmd.poracle_admin.group.emoji.desc: list, reload, or test emoji config
cmd.poracle_admin.group.ratelimit.desc: inspect and reset alert-bucket rate limits
cmd.poracle_admin.group.summary.desc: summary buffer inspection and forced dispatch
cmd.poracle_admin.group.config.desc: view effective merged config with secrets redacted
cmd.poracle_admin.group.warnings.desc: inspect captured WARN/ERROR log entries (startup + rolling buffers)
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.help.intro: Reload runtime state from disk or database.
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.dts.desc: `dts` — reload DTS templates and partials from disk
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.geofence.desc: `geofence` — reload geofence files and refresh state
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.state.desc: `state` — reload tracking rules and humans from MySQL (bypasses debounce)
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.geofence.succes: ✅ Geofence reloaded in {0}ms ({1} fences, {2} tracking rules)
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.state.success: ✅ State reloaded in {0}ms ({1} tracking rules, {2} active humans)
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.help.intro:
😀 Emoji config — inspect and manage emoji.json + Discord guild emojis.

Subcommands:
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.list.desc: `list` — list all configured emoji keys with per-platform resolutions
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.test.desc: `test <key>` — resolve one emoji key for the current platform
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.upload.desc: `upload [overwrite]` — upload uicons-based emojis to the guild and write a new emoji.json (Discord-only)
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.discord_config.d: `discord-config` — dump emoji.json from the current guild state, no uploads (Discord-only)
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.discord_only: ℹ️ This subcommand requires a Discord bot with guild access.
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.not_loaded: ℹ️ Emoji config not loaded (DTS renderer not configured).
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.test.not_found: ℹ️ Emoji key "{0}" not found in the loaded config.
cmd.poracle_admin.reconcile.help.intro: 🔄 Discord role reconciliation — trigger immediately instead of waiting for the periodic timer.
cmd.poracle_admin.reconcile.run.desc: `run` — reconcile all guild members now (blocks until complete)
cmd.poracle_admin.reconcile.user.desc: `user <id>` — reconcile a single Discord user by snowflake ID
cmd.poracle_admin.reconcile.not_configur: ❌ Discord reconciliation is not configured (Telegram-only deploy, or check_role=false).
cmd.poracle_admin.cache.help.intro: 🗺️ Geocoder cache — inspect counters or drop the in-memory layer.
cmd.poracle_admin.cache.clear.desc: `clear geocoder` — drop the in-memory geocoder cache
cmd.poracle_admin.cache.not_configured: Geocoder cache is not configured on this instance.
cmd.poracle_admin.cache.clear.usage_hint: Specify what to clear, e.g. `!poracle-admin cache clear geocoder`
cmd.poracle_admin.cache.clear.geocoder.s: ✅ Geocoder memory cache cleared — {0} entries dropped (disk untouched).
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.help.intro: 🚦 Rate-limit introspection — inspect or reset per-destination alert and summary buckets.
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.not_configur: ℹ️ Alert rate limiter is not configured on this instance.
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.list.desc: `list` — show all targets currently breached or banned
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.show.desc: `show <target>` — detailed state for one target (both buckets)
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.userlist.des: `userlist` — show currently disabled users (shortcut for !userlist disabled)
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.show.empty: 🟢 No recorded activity for {0} in either bucket.
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.reset.succes: ✅ Reset rate-limit state for {0} (cleared alert + summary buckets, violations reset).
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.reset.no_sta: ℹ️ No rate-limit state to reset for {0}.
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.reset.note: Note: admin_disable is NOT touched. If the user was auto-disabled by the rate-limiter, they still need to !poracle to re-register.
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.userlist.loo: ❌ Could not find !userlist command in the registry.
cmd.poracle_admin.summary.help.intro: 📦 Summary buffer — inspect who has quests buffered and force-dispatch on demand.
cmd.poracle_admin.summary.not_configured: ℹ️ Summary buffer is not configured on this instance.
cmd.poracle_admin.summary.list.desc: `list` — show all users with anything buffered
cmd.poracle_admin.summary.list.header: 📦 Summary buffer — {0} users with {1} buffered entries
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.help.intro:
🛠️ **!poracle-admin maintenance** — live control over outbound delivery.

Subcommands:
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.no_dispatc: ℹ️ Dispatcher is not available on this instance.
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.pause.desc: `pause [reason...]` (alias: `start`) — halt outbound delivery (webhooks still ingest, match, render, and queue)
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.resume.des: `resume` (alias: `stop`) — lift a previous pause and drain queued jobs
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.status.des: `status` — show current paused/running state and queue depth
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.pause.deta: Webhooks still ingest, match, render, and queue — the dispatcher holds them until !poracle-admin maintenance resume.
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.status.que: {0} jobs queued waiting (across all platforms — Discord {1}, Telegram {2})
cmd.poracle_admin.status.help.intro: !poracle-admin status — current health snapshot. Add -v for verbose mode (per-route Discord detail, full webhook per-type breakdown).
cmd.poracle_admin.status.paused_banner:
🔴 PAUSED — {0} (since {1} ago)
   Outbound delivery is held. Webhooks still ingest and queue.
cmd.poracle_admin.status.label.mysql_poo: Connections: {0}/{1} open ({2} in use, {3} idle, waits={4})
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.discord_only: ❌ Slash commands are Discord-only and cannot be managed from Telegram.
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.not_configured: ❌ Slash commands are not configured (Discord disabled or [discord.slash_commands] enabled=false).
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.sync.desc: push the current command set to Discord (fingerprint-cached, skips if unchanged)
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.force_resync.des: clear fingerprint cache and push unconditionally
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.clear_global.des: remove all globally-registered Discord slash commands
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.clear_guild.desc: remove slash commands from one guild (requires guild_id arg)
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.status.desc: show last sync timestamp and fingerprint per scope
cmd.poracle_admin.config.help.intro:
⚙️ Config viewer — show effective merged config with secrets redacted.
Subcommands:
cmd.poracle_admin.config.keys.desc: list section names with key counts
cmd.poracle_admin.config.section.desc: show just that section (e.g. `!poracle-admin config discord`)
cmd.poracle_admin.config.full.desc: show the full config (all sections, secrets redacted)
cmd.poracle_admin.config.unknown_section: Unknown config section: `{0}`. Use `!poracle-admin config keys` to list valid sections, or `!poracle-admin config search <term>` to search across all sections.
cmd.poracle_admin.config.search.desc: find keys whose path or value contains the term across every section (e.g. `!poracle-admin config search dm`)
cmd.poracle_admin.config.search.usage: Usage: `!poracle-admin config search <term>` — e.g. `search dm`, `search shlink`, `search 3030`.
cmd.poracle_admin.config.search.no_match: No config keys or values match `{0}`.
cmd.poracle_admin.warnings.help.intro:
🛠️ Captured warnings — inspect in-memory WARN/ERROR log entries.

Subcommands:
  (no arg) — show both startup and recent buffers
  `startup` — show only the startup buffer (first 200 entries, frozen after init)
  `recent` — show only the rolling buffer (last 50 entries)
  `clear` — empty the rolling buffer (startup is immutable)
cmd.poracle_admin.warnings.not_configure: ℹ️ Log buffer is not configured on this instance.
cmd.poracle_admin.warnings.cleared: ✅ Cleared {0} entries from the rolling buffer (startup buffer is unaffected).
cmd.poracle_admin.warnings.startup.desc: `startup` — show only the startup buffer (frozen after init)
cmd.poracle_admin.warnings.recent.desc: `recent` — show only the rolling buffer (last 50 entries)
cmd.maintenance.active_suffix: 🔧 Maintenance mode is active — alerts are not being delivered.
